name: Walter Huston
abstract: Walter Thomas Huston (  HEW-stən; April 6, 1883 or 1884 – April 7, 1950) was a Canadian actor and singer. Huston won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for his role in The Treasure of the Sierra Madre, directed by his son John Huston.

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Green
about_quotes.evidence: you had people like Tom Patricola (PHONETIC), James Barton, Walter Huston and George Murphy
